creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 254457
Add test

Thanks for submission.

I added TEST_TARGET and TEST_DEPENDS to test the port (see https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#make-test). But the `make test' fails.
Could you please check?

Maybe it's worth add a new patch with removes 'set -x' from tests/* because it's very annoying.
